pop  Rules 🔞‼️
1. *No Spamming of Stickers*: Avoid sending repetitive or unnecessary stickers.
2. *New Member Introduction*: Introduce yourself immediately after joining the group.
3. *No Ghosting*: Stay active and engaged; exit the group if you're no longer interested.
4. *Cruising*: Interact with others respectfully; disrespect won't be tolerated.
5. *Relationship Notification*: Notify C.E.O. (pop joskid) before pursuing a relationship with a group member.
6. *Sharing Thoughts*: Everyone can share their perspectives (redpills).
7. *Image Sharing*: Share images in "view once" mode, except admins.
8. *LGBTQ+ Content*: Not allowed in this group.
9. *Group Purpose*: This is a relationship-based forum and community.
10. *Respectful Language*: Use respectful language and avoid profanity or abusive words.
11. *No Hate Speech*: Avoid hate speech, bullying, or harassment of any kind.
12. *Keep it Civil*: Maintain a civil tone in discussions and disagreements.
13. *Report Issues*: Report any issues or concerns to the admins or C.E.O.
14. *No Self-Promotion*: Avoid self-promotion or advertising without admin approval.
15. *Stay On-Topic*: Keep discussions relevant to the group's purpose and topic.
16. *No Spamming Links*: Don't share suspicious or irrelevant links.
17. *Respect Boundaries*: Respect members' personal boundaries and decisions..
18  .  Gaysim and lesbianism is not allowed to the group if you see any one in that aspect in this group kindly notify the admins or the CEO
